creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
============
You’ve invited John Baldwin to The FreeBSD Project! They’ll be receiving an email shortly. They can also visit https://github.com/freebsd to accept the invitation.
============

I've added you to the Committers and Src teams. If you need access to additional GitHub teams, either request access via the team page on GiHub or let us know with a new issue here. 

Please also enable two-factor authentication if you haven't already.

Thanks!
